title: The Legion of Missing Men
writer: Sherman L. Lowe, Harry O. Hoyt, Norman S. Hall
actors: Ralph Forbes, Ben Alexander, Hala Linda
plot: Bob Carter, a member of the Foreign Legion, is glad to see his brother, Don, for the first time in ten years but is sorry that Don has joined the Legion. Bob, Don and Bob's buddies, Muggsy and Bilgey, go to a café and there Don fa...
